record.field:
Generate an image using a specified image generation model. This tool allows you to create images based on text prompts.
Parameters: model_id: The ID of the llm.model to use for generation (must have model_use='image_generation') inputs: A dictionary containing parameters according to the model's input_schema (e.g., {"prompt": "A detailed description"})
Returns: A dictionary containing: - success: Boolean indicating if the generation was successful - image_urls: List of URLs to the generated images - markdown: Ready-to-use markdown for displaying the images in chat
